additions.summary: Pre-flight export size validation without full generation: ValidateExportSize contract checks whether an export would exceed 50 MB using estimated row count, enabling early failure.
Exponential backoff retry strategy: Delivery retries use exponential backoff (e.g., 5min, 15min, 60min) rather than fixed intervals, reducing delivery service load.
Circuit-breaker semantics for delivery: Delivery Pipeline explicitly provides circuit-breaker semantics to prevent cascading failures beyond the three-attempt limit.
Pause reason tracking on schedules: ScheduledExport model includes pause_reason field to distinguish manual pauses from automatic circuit-breaker pauses due to delivery failures.
Feature flag caching with TTL: IsExportEnabled contract specifies caching with configurable TTL (e.g., 1 minute) to reduce flag lookup overhead.
Exactly-once delivery semantics: Scheduler uses a durable task queue with exactly-once semantics to prevent duplicate scheduled export executions.
CSV-only format for scheduled exports: Scheduled exports default to and are constrained to CSV format, while on-demand exports support both CSV and PDF.
